text:
Once upon a midsummer evening, nestled in a forest glade adorned with wildflowers, there lived a young squirrel named Tiny Timmy.

Timmy scuttled about collecting little buglets to snack on later. Every tree branch was like an adventure waiting to happen. On one particularly golden hour, he stumbled upon a peculiar-looking berry. Its vivid pink reminded him of a smile.

Curiosity propelled him to try it. To his delight, tiny pearls of laughter fluttered down into his mouth.

The next day, he decided to share his secret joy-seed with the squirrel community.

Soon, laughter rang throughout the forest. Animals of every kind, from the wise old owl to the playful squirrels, laughed contagiously.

The forest's mood became one of pure joy. The humans walking their dogs would stop to listen.

Little Timmy realized that the funniest moments often come from the unexpected. Perhaps laughter is the genuine echo chamber that nature loves.

Many thanks to that peculiar pink berry for
